audience_policies.source_phrase: Pass admits 6 people to Franklin Park Zoo (Boston) or Stone Zoo (Stoneham). Discounted rate is $9 per adult; $6 per child. Free admission for children under 2. ZOOLIGHTS is not discounted with pass.
